title: MongoDB Live Operations Triage
description: Identify slow operations, index usage issues, and resource consumption in MongoDB
author: A. Sharma

current_op_summary.description: Current operations from db.currentOp() — active queries and their duration

interactive_hints.server_status: Run to get memory, connection, and operation counters from serverStatus()
interactive_hints.collection_stats: Run when slow ops are concentrated on a specific collection — checks index usage and collection size
interactive_hints.stop: Stop here and generate the final analysis with results gathered so far

interactive_hints.collection_stats: Run to drill into collection-level index and scan statistics
interactive_hints.stop: Stop here and generate the final analysis with results gathered so far

collection_stats.description: Collection index usage and scan statistics

interactive_hints.stop: Stop here and generate the final analysis with results gathered so far
